positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with a visible session indicator
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the authenticated user's name or profile indicator is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains on the authenticated page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or Ctrl+R)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password characters are masked during input and login succeeds successfully
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Click on the password input field
Type the valid password in the password field
Verify that the entered characters are masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Password field masks input characters for security

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is case-insensitive for email and the user is successfully authenticated and redirected
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' (uppercase version of the valid email) in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase characters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and protected routes are no longer accessible
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or option
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that accessing a protected route directly now redirects to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements are correctly rendered, visible, and interactive
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the page title or heading contains login-related text (e.g., 'Login', 'Sign In')
Verify the username/email input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is visible and enabled
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or 'Remember Me' links/checkboxes are present if applicable
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements are present and correctly rendered

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A validation error message is displayed indicating the email/username field is required and login does not proceed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Username is required'
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when username/email field is left empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A validation error message is displayed indicating the password field is required and login does not proceed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Password is required'
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when password field is left empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields and the login form does not submit
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field completely empty
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify error messages are displayed for both fields (e.g., 'Email is required' and 'Password is required')
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when both username and password fields are empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An authentication error message is displayed and the user is not granted access
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect password', or 'Username or password is incorrect'
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with a valid email but incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An appropriate error message is displayed indicating the user does not exist or credentials are invalid
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistent_user_xyz@invalid.com' in the username/email field
Enter any password (e.g., 'SomePassword123!') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found'
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with an invalid/non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A format validation error is displayed and the login request is not submitted to the server
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@format..com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Please enter a valid email address' or 'Invalid email format'
Verify the user remains on the login page and the form does not submit
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with a malformed email address format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application handles the SQL injection input safely, denies access, and displays an appropriate error without exposing system information
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter 'AnyPassword123' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify no unauthorized access is granted
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'Invalid email format')
Verify the application does not crash or expose sensitive information
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with SQL injection attempt in the email field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Whitespace-only input is treated as invalid/empty and an appropriate validation error is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter '     ' (spaces only) in the username/email field
Enter '     ' (spaces only) in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify a validation error is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Invalid email format'
Verify the user remains on the login page and login does not proceed
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails with whitespace-only entries in username and password fields
